task_updates.executor_notes: Created `llm/client.ts` with `callOpenRouter` kept internal and `invokeLlmWithRetry` exported. Verified it imports and uses `toErrorMessage` from the correct relative shared path for this module (`../../_shared/errorMessage.ts`) and types the logger as `Pick<EdgeRuntime['logger'], 'error' | 'info'>`, matching the `withEdgeRequest` runtime logger surface used here. Local `deno check` remains unavailable because `deno` is not installed.

Created `llm/messages.ts` and moved the 12 pure helpers out of the monolith: `isRecord`, `isSessionStatus`, `normalizeTurns`, `createTurn`, `createToolTurn`, `normalizeSessionRow`, `normalizeTimelineRow`, `parseToolArgsSafely`, `formatToolArgs`, `summarizeStoredToolTurn`, `buildInitialMessages`, and `extractAssistantText`. Verified all 12 are exported and `buildInitialMessages` reads `MAX_CONTEXT_TURNS` from `config.ts`. Local `deno check` remains unavailable because `deno` is not installed.

Created `tools/timeline.ts` by moving the existing timeline manipulation functions unchanged and added a `handlers` record of `ToolHandler` wrappers that read `ctx.config` and `ctx.registry`. Verified the handler keys cover the full timeline tool set from the schema: `view_timeline`, `move_clip`, `trim_clip`, `set_clip_property`, `delete_clip`, `add_text_clip`, and `find_issues`. Local `deno check` remains unavailable because `deno` is not installed.

Created `tools/session.ts` with `messageUser` and `done` adapted to the shared `(args, ctx) => ToolResult` interface through a `handlers` record. Verified invalid argument handling matches the monolith strings exactly: `message_user requires a text string.` and `done requires a summary string.` Local `deno check` remains unavailable because `deno` is not installed.
commands_run: rg -n "message_user|done requires a summary string|message_user requires a text string" supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/session.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Created `tools/generation.ts` with `requireEnv`, `sha256Hex`, `getIdempotencyKey`, and `createGenerationTask` adapted to the shared handler interface. Verified the HTTP failure branch now returns `Failed to create task: ...` instead of throwing, while the environment guard still throws as before. Local `deno check` remains unavailable because `deno` is not installed.
commands_run: rg -n "Failed to create task|throw new Error" supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/generation.ts

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `invokeLlmWithRetry` uses `toErrorMessage` in both retry error logs, and `llm/client.ts` types its logger as `Pick<EdgeRuntime['logger'], 'error' | 'info'>`, which matches the logger surface actually consumed from `withEdgeRequest`. The correct relative import path from `llm/client.ts` is `../../_shared/errorMessage.ts`.

All 12 extracted helpers are present and exported from `llm/messages.ts`: `isRecord`, `isSessionStatus`, `normalizeTurns`, `createTurn`, `createToolTurn`, `normalizeSessionRow`, `normalizeTimelineRow`, `parseToolArgsSafely`, `formatToolArgs`, `summarizeStoredToolTurn`, `buildInitialMessages`, and `extractAssistantText`.

The `tools/timeline.ts` `handlers` record includes all timeline tool names from the original `timelineTools` export and the schema: `view_timeline`, `move_clip`, `trim_clip`, `set_clip_property`, `delete_clip`, `add_text_clip`, and `find_issues`. Session-only tools remain in their own modules.

`tools/session.ts` validates both required fields in the handlers and returns the same error-result strings used in the monolith: `message_user requires a text string.` and `done requires a summary string.`

`tools/generation.ts` replaces the old HTTP error throw with `return { result: `Failed to create task: ${message}` }` in the non-OK response path. The remaining `throw new Error` is only the unchanged `requireEnv` guard, which is outside the requested fix.
